text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Awww... Even as plushies, Umamusume are the
most precious of flowers. They aren't to be taken
lightly.
choice_data_list: Sorry... I didn't have what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's okay! You didn't do anything wrong!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've already abandoned my worldly desires for
things such as cuddling and petting, but I suppose
I still have a ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to build more good karma and purify
myself further to become a simp worthy of a
Cutie!
